message:
feat(vectordb): add structured error types and integrate ConnectorRuntime

Introduce VectorDbError with InvalidRequest/Provider/Internal variants
implementing ConnectorErrorMapping for retry-aware error classification.
Wire ConnectorRuntime into VectorDbConnector lifecycle (init on configure,
teardown on shutdown).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
